goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'sunday'.
The train should 'leave after 17:15' and should go to 'bishops stortford'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time', 'price', and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre' and should be in the type of 'museum'.
Make sure you get 'postcode', 'address', and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on sunday
The train should leave after 17:15 and should go to bishops stortford
Make sure you get arrival time, price, and travel time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre and should be in the type of museum
Make sure you get postcode, address, and phone number
